# Ajentify

> Fully-hosted AI agent infrastructure. Build AI agents, not infrastructure —
> prototype in an afternoon, scale to production on the same platform. Message
> storage, tool orchestration, context, testing, and voice are handled for you.

Ajentify is for developers who want to spend less time setting up AI infra and
more time building on top of it. Start simple; the same platform scales to
complex production apps (10xAgent was built this way).

## Core concepts

- **Agent**: a name, a system prompt (plain text with `{{prompt_args}}`), a
  model, and a set of tools. Model-agnostic.
- **Tools**: functions the agent can call. Server-side, or client-side to drive
  your app's UI (navigate, read page data, fill forms, control state).
- **SRE (Structured Response Endpoint)**: a typed, reusable LLM call — a prompt
  template + named variables + a JSON output schema. Use for judges,
  extractors, classifiers.
- **Mem-docs**: JSON memory documents the agent reads as knowledge.
- **Data Windows**: real-time cached data injected straight into the context
  window, so the agent sees live information.
- **Context control**: generate, edit, or remove any message and inject system
  prompts mid-conversation via the API.
- **Testing**: the `ajentify-testing` framework runs simulated conversations
  with deterministic `assert_*` checks and LLM-powered `assess_*` evaluations,
  output as markdown reports for CI.
- **Voice**: the same agent definition can power a WebRTC voice experience
  (speech-to-text, LLM, ElevenLabs text-to-speech) with full tool execution.
- **Manifest + CLI**: your whole agent is declarative config in
  `ajentify.manifest.json`. Deploy with `npx ajentify deploy --stage <stage>`,
  which diffs and applies changes (infra-as-code for agents).

## Getting started

1. Install the CLI: `npm i -D @ajentify/cli`
2. Define an agent, a tool, and an SRE in `ajentify.manifest.json`.
3. Deploy: `npx ajentify deploy --stage dev`
4. Embed in your app: the `@ajentify/chat` SDK (`AjentifyProvider` + `ChatPanel`,
   plus `useDoPageAction` / `useGetPageData` hooks for client-side tools).

## Links

- Docs: https://ajentify.com/docs
- Frontend SDK: `@ajentify/chat`
- CLI: `@ajentify/cli`
